scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/server && npm run lint -w packages/web
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w packages/server && npm run type-check -w packages/web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run docker:up && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
